body_txt: Bob has always looked up to his father and believes him to be the best man who ever lived but what's this? His father has long been dead and he is suddenly told that everything he knew about the man was a lie. Naturally, Bob denies this at first, but eventually is forced to accept reality. Compare Delusions of Parental Love , Mama Didn't Raise No Criminal , Never Speak Ill of the Dead . Accepting the truth may lead to a Broken Pedestal . Compare Sins of Our Fathers .
